subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! After forty years of captivity in fetters and chains, I have come to the realm of Joseph the Truthful, and now with the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوسفا بعد از چهل سال اسیری بند و زنجیر باقلیم یوسف صدیق آمدم و حال با یاران
subcodes.subjects: @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @importance of prayer, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions
